title: Dark’s Heart Indicator
description: A simple lightweight mod which displays players health above their head. Perfect for pvp
body:
# Dark's Heart Indicator

Dark's Heart Indicator is a lightweight client-side mod that displays player health above their head in real time. It is designed to improve visibility during combat while maintaining a clean and unobtrusive interface.

---
![in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ba2594f6091732a0ad9003339b4bfbd178aaf5c.jpeg)

## Features

* Displays hearts above player names
* Real-time health updates
* Lightweight and performance-friendly
* Toggleable using a keybind
* Fully client-side, no server installation required

---

## Usage

Install the mod with Fabric Loader and launch the game. The heart indicator will appear automatically. Use the assigned keybind to toggle the display on or off as needed.

---

## Compatibility

* Fabric Loader required
* Compatible with multiplayer servers (client-side only)

---

## Notes

This mod does not modify gameplay mechanics and only affects client-side rendering. Other players must have the mod installed to see the same visuals.
